title: Racon Paintings
description: This project changes every painting into a high definition picture of racon in a boat.
body:
This is a texture pack that changes the texture of every painting into a high quality (848x848) racon (another way to type Raccoon) in a boat.
It is especially used for trolling purposes or just to make your paintings very much cooler!!
You should totally download it just to test it out.
Some paintings are buggy, which makes it way more fun!
